lifecycle.note: A code-editing packet with proposed work, patch review, diff review, and verification.

blocks.title: A code editing handoff that agents can actually consume
blocks.lede: This example shows the process Dossier shape for coding work: work items, editable snippets, patch proposals, diff review, verification receipts, trust claims, and closeout.

items.title: Persist selected filter
items.summary: Save the active search filter in the URL query so refresh and share links preserve state.

items.title: Improve empty results state
items.summary: Show the active filter and a clear reset action when no results match.

blocks.title: Editable helper proposal
blocks.summary: `dossier serve` enhances this textarea with CodeMirror 6 while Dossier still exports plain `dossier.edits/v1`.

blocks.title: Proposed patches
blocks.summary: A patch set groups intent, touched files, risk, verification, and optional unified diffs.

patches.title: Persist filter in query string
patches.summary: Add a small helper and wire the search panel to update the URL.

blocks.title: Standalone diff review
blocks.summary: Diff review packets can capture file-level and hunk-level comments.

runs.title: Unit tests
runs.expected: Filter helper and empty state tests pass.

sources.label: Verification plan
sources.summary: Commands still need to be run in the host repo.

claims.claim: The packet contains enough information for an agent to start implementation.
The patch is not verified or merged until host commands pass.
